title: cinnamomum mercadoi
intro: Cinnamomum mercadoi, also known as Philippine cinnamon or salam, is a plant species native to the Philippines that belongs to the cinnamon family. The bark of this plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum mercadoi include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cinnamomum mercadoi is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
